assertions.description: No screenshot files are committed when no dashboards are affected
assertions.evidence: No after-*.png or before-*.png files exist in v2/screenshots/ directory. Correct behavior.

assertions.description: Agent explicitly states that no dashboards are affected by the changes
assertions.evidence: Agent output: 'No dashboard JSON files were modified in this PR. No screenshots needed.' — clearly communicates that no dashboards are affected.

notes: Without the skill, the agent correctly identifies no dashboard changes by checking git diff. This is a straightforward case but still requires the agent to know the correct path pattern (v2/grafana/dashboards/*.json).
